title: SAP security advisory – March 2026 monthly rollup (AV26-209)
description: On March 10, 2026, SAP published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in multiple products. Included were critical updates for the following:
products: SAP NetWeaver Enterprise Portal Administration  version EP-RUNTIME 7.50
SAP Quotation Management Insurance Application (FS-QUO)  version FS-QUO 800
SAP Supply Chain Management  multiple versions
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
